# LeaderLedger

> Andhra Pradesh 2024 State Assembly election — candidate transparency database. Criminal cases from ECI affidavits, education, profession, election results, and live news for all 175 elected MLAs. Data sourced exclusively from official government records.

LeaderLedger.in is a public-interest data journalism tool for voters in Andhra Pradesh, India. It covers the 2024 AP Legislative Assembly election in which the Telugu Desam Party (TDP) + Janasena + BJP alliance won 164 of 175 seats. All candidate data is drawn from Election Commission of India (ECI) sworn affidavits, official ECI result portals, and TCPD electoral databases — no estimates or extrapolations are used.

## What the site contains

- **175 elected MLA profiles** — one per constituency across all 26 districts of Andhra Pradesh
- **Criminal cases** — counts and summaries from ECI Form 26 affidavits, extracted via OCR + LLM pipeline
- **Education & profession** — as declared on affidavits
- **2024 election results** — vote counts, margins, runner-up details (ECI June 2024)
- **2019 baseline** — previous MLA, votes, margin for comparison
- **Live news feed** — Google News RSS, refreshed hourly via GitHub Actions, per candidate
- **Constituency map** — interactive SVG district/constituency map of Andhra Pradesh
- **Party coverage** — TDP (135 MLAs), Janasena Party (21), YSRCP (11), BJP (8)

## How to use this site

The site is a React SPA with hash-based routing:

| Page | URL |
|------|-----|
| Home / District map | https://leaderledger.in/ |
| Candidate gallery (search, filter by party/criminal cases) | https://leaderledger.in/#/list |
| Individual MLA profile | https://leaderledger.in/#/profile/{id} |
| News feed | https://leaderledger.in/#/news |

Candidate IDs are integers 1–175 corresponding to constituency numbers 1–175.

## Machine-readable data

- Full candidate dataset (JSON): https://leaderledger.in/data/candidates.json
- News feed (JSON): https://leaderledger.in/data/news.json
- Candidate sitemaps: https://leaderledger.in/sitemap-candidates.xml

## All 175 MLAs — quick reference

Format: [id] Name (Party) — Constituency | criminal cases | election margin | prev MLA

- [1] **Ashok Bendalam** (TDP) — ICHCHAPURAM | 5 criminal case(s) | won by 39,783 votes | prev MLA 2019 (TDP)
- [2] **Jagadeeswari Thoyaka** (TDP) — KURUPAM | 3 criminal case(s) | won by 23,500 votes | prev MLA 2019 (YSRCP)

## Data sources & methodology

- **Criminal cases**: ECI Form 26 affidavits (PDF), OCR via Tesseract, structured extraction via gemma3:4b local LLM. Each case has pending charges or conviction details.
- **Election results**: ECI June 2024 results portal (archived via Wayback Machine snapshot 2025-11-06).
- **2019 results**: ECI 2019 results portal (archived via Wayback Machine snapshot 2019-05-26).
- **Registered electors / turnout**: Wikipedia 2024 (21 constituencies), TCPD 2019 data (154 constituencies). No estimates used — gaps show the available source year.
- **News**: Google News RSS API, decoded via googlenewsdecoder, refreshed hourly.

## About

Built by an independent researcher. Source: public ECI data. Contact: leaderledger.in (see site footer).
No affiliation with any political party or government body.
